description: Style Note Featuring your little boy's favourite cartoon characters, this pair of flip-flops from marvel will be an instant hit. With grippy thong style straps and grooved outsoles these flip-flops offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day. Product Details Yellow flip-flops with a colourful print on the footbed featuring Marvel heroes  Black and red thong style straps Horizontal grooves on outsole  Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite cartoon characters, this pair of flip-flops from Marvel will be an instant hit.
